reviews.review_description: It is a pretty accurate and intuitive app

Before this, studying anatomy was tough  we had to fight for cadaver time, and it was hard to really understand structures. Now, with Medical Holodeck, I basically have a whole cadaver in my room! I can explore organs, rotate them, and study anytime I want. It’s immersive, fun, and makes learning so much easier. Honestly, it’s changed the way my group and I memorize and understand anatomy.
Even though I only have the meta quest 2 the graphics and models are still amazing. I can't wait to try it on the 3. Would definitely recommend

reviews.review_title: License key is invalid – unable to unloc
reviews.review_description:
Hello,

I purchased this medical product and encountered a problem with accessing the content.
Most images and sections (digestive system, respiratory system, and other organs) are locked and require a “key”.

It appears to be related to a license. When I open the license section, I see a six-digit numeric code. I enter this code as instructed, but the system still says that the key is not valid (inviable / invalid).

Please clarify:
• what kind of license this is,
• where and how the correct license key can be obtained,
• and where exactly it should be entered to unlock the remaining content.

This information is not explained in the product description or instructions, and at the moment it is impossible to use the product fully.

I would appreciate your official response and assistance in resolving this issue.

As an anatomy teacher in Ukraine, I can confidently say that this VR application is a modern and highly effective educational tool. It significantly enhances students’ spatial understanding, makes learning anatomy visual and engaging, and serves as an excellent complement to traditional teaching methods. I highly recommend it for use in medical education.
Looks impressive
This is an amazing tool. Radiologists can upload DICOM files to see a 3D model of patient’s MR or CT imagings. The segmentation and rendering capabilities are top notch.

I enjoy going on your app. Can you do surgeries? .  When I went on ￼ my first medical app ￼you have to be the doctor or a student with a license or in the process of achieving one, ￼you couldn’t go farther into the app without it .￼
As you know, this is Meta quest VR fantasies, achieved to play acting. Always wanted to do a surgery to achieve my goal, but was unable to do so.. with VR you can do many things.  I like the realization of him moving the cadaver around and then being able to go in between the spaces of the patient you know like being able to do a surgery. ￼ So are you able to do surgery on your app? ￼ the only thing I don’t like is the fact that you have it in virtual reality is that the only way it can be done?  Anyway, I like your app because it looks so real. Can’t wait to get the license.  I don’t want free months.￼￼

reviews.review_title: An Intuitive and Powerful Learning App
reviews.review_description: The medicalholodeck app stands out for its combination of advanced features and ease of use. It offers powerful, well-designed tools that support efficient learning without being overwhelming. It also has a lot of learning videos that are helping users to learn more efficiently. The interface is clean, intuitive, and easy to navigate, making studying more organized and effective. It is an excellent app for both beginners and advanced medical students.
I love the amount of information and the ability of "dive" into the human body
I love the medical Holodeck , really good to reviewing some Anatomie . For Students ist  really  on point and easy to learn.
The available models are in a very high resolution and the tools are very intuitive and easy to use.

reviews.review_title: I just started to use it
reviews.review_description: I haven’t really fully used it yet. But so far it is amazing what you could do with VR and AR in medical training. I see huge potential in this!
It was always hard visualizing anatomy as Med student , This totally changed the Game !!
Excellent app, great illustrations and functionality

I really enjoyed this application. I work in health education, and it helped me a lot to build clinical cases with very realistic three-dimensional elements. The image quality is excellent, and its navigation is very intuitive and appealing to students. I highly recommend this program for educational environments.
It is a really good app, and I was able to get my questions answered about the Human Anatomy, I wish it was more obvious that I would have to have a subscription to use it more
Medicalholodeck is an outstanding platform for medical education. The 3D DICOM viewer and VR simulations make learning anatomy and clinical cases highly immersive and intuitive.
The App is very useful for medical students. I think it should be part of the learning methods in all universities.
It allows great interaction with content which is very close to reality.
As a neurosurgery resident, I work a lot with CT and MRI. Medicalholodeck makes it an easy and incredible way for learning and surgical planning.

reviews.review_title: Revolutionary App That Helped Me Win!
reviews.review_description: MedicalHoloDeck is an outstanding app that made it incredibly easy to demonstrate complex medical imaging techniques through virtual reality. I especially loved the cross-sectional view and the light and annotation tools, which made it super intuitive to highlight and explain key structures. Being able to import my own DICOM files was a game-changer—it gave my presentation a personal, professional touch. This app helped me win first place in a school competition, and I’d highly recommend it to anyone looking to explore or present medical imaging in an engaging, interactive way.

Seems like a great app but poorly optimized? I had 22 GB disk space on Quest 3, and it could not show the Spine module, very low frame rate and crashed, on several tries. Happy to update the review after getting a fix or an explanation. Thanks.
EXCELLENT ANTOMY APPLICATION, I ADVICE EVERY ONE TO DOWNLOAD AND TRY IT, I ENJOYED THE ANATOMY THROUGH THIS NICE APP

Medicalholodeck has completely transformed the way we study anatomy and medical concepts. The level of detail and the interactive features allow us to visualize and understand complex structures in a much more immersive and efficient way. It feels like stepping into the human body!

We’ve been using it intensively during our study sessions, and even our professor was amazed by the level of detail and functionality it offers. It’s a must-have for any student or professional in the medical field looking to elevate their learning experience.

Highly recommended for anyone who wants to explore anatomy in an innovative and dynamic way. This app is truly a game-changer!
MEDICALHOLODECK Is amazing. I have learned so much by using it. Has helped for understanding the human body better.

We work with cadavers in my anatomy class and being able to look at 3D cadaver models outside of normal lab time is extremely helpful. Especially if I am not sure what I am looking at with the real cadaver, the 3D models help me to compare anatomical differences between what is offered in this app, images, and real cadavers.

This is an amazing concept and this app is the best execution of that concept which I have seen. I hope more models get added and the app gets even better in the future!
Really wonderful
Its really useful to study as a med student!

My gf and I are working our way through loads of Medical Dramas and having access to this is the cherry on top as we can learn even more about medicine and surgeries. 
Amazing app and mind blowing technology!
As a medical student, this is such a great app for visualizing the human anatomy and clinical applications at such an intricate level. 10/10
This app has helped me with anatomy revision, it’s great to see the anatomy in a 3D format, and is useful for clinical work. It has a great videos to help, and is very responsive

As a first year medical student, I loved this app as it allowed to give me perspective into so many structures elusive in both lessons and in the textbook and artificial models used in seminars. Absolutely love the possibility of using multiple headsets and I intend to use it for collaborating with my friends worldwide. I’d appreciate a bit more variety in the models and perhaps a “pin test” where a student can pin structures and tests themselves but that’s easily possible with the current pin option. Overall, an excellent app, perfect for all students and professionals seeking to expand their knowledge of anatomy.
Great app for learning! Love being able to take the anatomy apart in my living room! It’s like the brain scene from iron man 3! Spectacular
Great for pre-op visualisation of anatomical structures. Quite intuitive once you get the hang of it. Highly recommended!
I found the app to be fairly helpful with supplementing learning anatomy. The controls were a little confusing at first but easy to get a hold of.
Found this one of the best DICOM viewers in spatial computing. The CLUT adjustment works well on MRI recons and I have actually been using this for pre op planning with anonymisation.  Game changer.
this is so good for people like me who are just starting their medicine career. It has a good amount of models and content and though it can be improved it's very good

I am a general surgeon. I have been using Medical Holodeck for some years for preopeative evaluation of my patients and for educational purposes with my residents and students. The Visualization of spatial anatomy in the VR space allows me to better prepare complex repairs but also communicate to my residents and students the complexities of surgical anatomy.

Being able to visualise and immerse yourself within structures that you otherwise only read about, and thus seem abstract, is amazing for truly understanding not only certain anatomical structures but their relationships to other parts of the body.

Also makes memorisation much easier as you can more easily callback the model in your head after spending time dissecting it virtually.

I’ve tried a few different programs and this one is truly special, highly recommend it

reviews.review_title: A total game changer for VR/AR medicine!
reviews.review_description: Medicalholodeck is an outstanding tool for anyone involved in healthcare education and clinical practice. It creates a unique and immersive environment where users can explore complex medical cases, viewing detailed medical images in ways that traditional methods simply can't match. With the ability to work collaboratively in virtual reality, teams can examine and discuss patient cases from any angle, making it invaluable for training, surgical planning, and patient care. The platform is also perfect for educators, offering interactive anatomy models and virtual dissections that engage students in new and exciting ways. RecordXR has been a game-changer, allowing lessons to be recorded and shared in a dynamic virtual format, making learning more accessible. Plus, their responsive support team and regular updates ensure a smooth and evolving experience, continually enhancing the quality of education and collaboration.

Medicalholodeck is an excellent tool for visualizing our AI cancer segmentations and   3D models.
Helps us to under stand the  cancer details through Radiology images in an immersive way.
An excellent tool for professionals and students. It has a lot of details and its use promotes the effective improvement of anatomical knowledge.

I want to preface this review by saying that I haven't been able to try the Anatomy Master yet, so I will update the review after trying that out too.

I work in emergency medicine and have been using this mainly for self-study. I am a very visual learner, and being able to interact with the full 3D models is unbelievably helpful in understanding anatomy in greater depth.

The information presented is nothing new, of course, but seeing drawings and photos in a book or on a screen just can't compare to having the body as a fully interactive model in front of you. Layered dissections are incredible, and the pre-recorded short lectures show the immense potential VR has as an educational tool. I can't begin to imagine how the availability of this technology could impact interactive education and telemedicine.

I can't say much about the medical imaging aspect as this is not my area of expertise, but even without in-depth training, it's fantastic to see and interact with 3D objects of the scans rather than viewing them on a screen. Incredible potential here too.

So, even with the anatomical part still unavailable to me, it has been worth every cent, and I can't wait to see what the developers have planned for future updates.

Hello , I am Dr. Alhmood , I am a neurologist 
I have been using the software , and I have been absolutely blown away by its capabilities. T ،he ability to visualize and interact with medical images in a 3D environment has been a game-changer for my practice, allowing me to provide better care for my patients.

For example, I recently used the software to diagnose a patient with a complex brain tumor. The 3D images allowed me to see the tumor in much greater detail than I would have been able to with traditional 2D imaging techniques. This allowed me to plan a more precise surgery, which led to better outcomes for the patient.

I would also like to express my appreciation for the support provided by your team. I encountered a few questions while using the software, and your team was always quick to respond and helpful.

I recommend all doctors to register in medicalholodeck because it is the best medical VR application in the world. 
Best regards ٠
Great! It helps in the anatomy details.

This showed me a lot about how the muscles in the body function. Love that it has links to other sources readily available. The UI is a little intimidating. Hopefully they can make it more user friendly and interactive in the future. Then it would be perfect.

Medicalholodeck is is going to be the best Medical Virtual Reality (MVR) platform.  
The software reaches unprecedented dimensions resulting in a new standard in medical image viewing.
I can’t get past the first screen.

reviews.review_title: Medical VR - the future is now
reviews.review_description:
Medicalholodeck is the best VR experience I have had so far. I was amazed by the features and quality of the models.
Very useful for surgical planning- this is my friend's opinion; he is an ENT surgeon.

Help doctor and radiology to analyze and plan for operation.

Help medical faculty to improve learning process by cutting cost and expedite student learning process.
There are bugs at skip button and start trial 7day button
